## What & why

<!-- one line: what this changes and why. Link an issue if one exists. -->

## Kind of change

- [ ] feat (new behavior)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs / meta
- [ ] test (falsifiable proof only)

## Verification (Verified-by-Math — required)

- [ ] `npm run boot` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (RED + GREEN cases added/updated)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` clean
- [ ] Every behavior change has a deterministic, falsifiable test

## DCO

- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — see DCO.md

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- anything the reviewer should know: red-line areas touched, breaking changes, etc. -->
